value.description: Whether the generated demo.launch.py should start RViz
Name of the ROS package to generate for this lab

Object orientation [R, P, Y] in radians (roll about X, pitch about Y, yaw about Z). Optional; defaults to 0,0,0. Maps to the roll/pitch/yaw components of the generated static_objects pose so objects can be placed at angles.
Instance orientation [R, P, Y] in radians. Optional; defaults to 0,0,0. Maps to the roll/pitch/yaw of the generated static_objects pose.
UR model used to generate the ROS package; must be one of the supported ur_description types
Initial joint angles (radians) used to seed the ROS package's ros2_control state interfaces and initial_positions.yaml
Base pitch about Y in radians (P for ROS base_coordinates)
Base roll about X in radians (R for ROS base_coordinates)
Add a floor collision plane to the MoveIt planning scene so the arm won't plan through z<0. Default true.
Height (metres) of the floor collision plane (its top sits 2 cm below this). Default 0.0.

Optional 3D model reference for the generated static_object. When present it renders this model in Gazebo (include) and/or uses its mesh for MoveIt collision instead of the primitive shape. Populated e.g. by scripts/add-model.

include.description: package:// or model:// URI of a reusable Gazebo model (Gazebo visual)

mesh.description: package:// or file:// path to a mesh (.dae/.stl/.obj) used as the MoveIt collision geometry

scale.description: Mesh scale: a single number (uniform) or [sx, sy, sz]
